fields.Text:
What is the method of production of Carbon-11?

{{c1::Cyclotron}}
fields.Extra:
Carbon-11
Production: Cyclotron
Decay: Beta⁺ (100%)
Principal photon energies: 511 keV (annihilation)
Half-life: 20.4 minutes
Notes: Positron-emitting PET radionuclide; may label compounds such as choline for PET imaging. Its short half-life generally requires nearby cyclotron production.

fields.Text:
What is the mode of decay of Carbon-11?

{{c1::Beta⁺ (100%)}}
